name: BR30 LED Light Bulb – 10W – UL Approved
description: Features: Energy Efficient: 10W LED bulb replaces a 75W incandescent bulb, reducing energy costs. Adjustable CCT: Choose between 3000K, 4000K, and 5000K to match your desired ambiance. Dimmable Feature: Compatible with most dimmers for customizable brightness. Long Lifespan: Delivers up to 25,000 hours of consistent, reliable lighting. ETL Certified: Complies with recognized safety and efficiency standards for residential and commercial applications.
short_desc: Product Attributes: Wattage: 10W Lumen Output: 860 Lumens Adjustable CCT: 3000K, 4000K, 5000K Dimmable: Yes Housing Color: White Size: BR30 Base Type: E26 Light Color: Warm White (WW), Neutral White (NW), Cool White (CW) Watt Equivalent: 75W Brightness: 4 out of 5 Pack Size: 4 Pack ETL Listed: Yes Height: 5.1 in. Diameter: 3.7 in. Voltage: 120V AC Warranty: 1 Year CRI (Color Rendering Index): >80 Lifespan: 25,000 hours
